# scanner

```go
import "github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/internal/scanner"
```

Package scanner analyzes a directory and groups files by a built\-in extension dictionary, producing a list of detected categories for use by the init command's \-\-scan flag.

## Index

- [type DetectedCategory](<#DetectedCategory>)
- [type Result](<#Result>)
  - [func Scan\(path string\) \(Result, error\)](<#Scan>)


<a name="DetectedCategory"></a>
## type [DetectedCategory](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/blob/main/internal/scanner/scanner.go#L14-L17>)

DetectedCategory is a category found during a scan.

```go
type DetectedCategory struct {
    Name       string   // category name from the dictionary
    Extensions []string // extensions actually found (no leading dot, e.g. "jpg")
}
```

<a name="Result"></a>
## type [Result](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/blob/main/internal/scanner/scanner.go#L20-L24>)

Result holds the outcome of a Scan call.

```go
type Result struct {
    // Categories detected in the scanned path, in dictionary order.
    // Only categories with at least one matching file are included.
    Categories []DetectedCategory
}
```

<a name="Scan"></a>
### func [Scan](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/blob/main/internal/scanner/scanner.go#L48>)

```go
func Scan(path string) (Result, error)
```

Scan reads the top\-level entries of path and returns the categories whose extensions appear at least once. Directories inside path are skipped. Returns an error if path does not exist or is not a directory.
